name: iago
description: IAGO: Issues A GOgo for syncing and relaying GitHub issues from a git repository.

scripts.test: node --check ./src/node/cli/cli.js && node --check ./src/node/server/server.js && node --check ./src/node/shared/repository.js && powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path './src/rust/Cargo.toml')) { exit 1 }; if (!(Test-Path './build/rust/cli/build-windows-exe.ps1')) { exit 1 }; if (!(Test-Path './build/rust/server/build-windows-exe.ps1')) { exit 1 }; & \"$env:USERPROFILE\.cargo\bin\cargo.exe\" check --manifest-path ./src/rust/Cargo.toml --target-dir \"$env:TEMP\tools-github-issues-resolver-rust-check\""
